'''Motel Nebulus''', or '''''Motal Nebuli''''' in [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]], was a motel in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It also had a nightclub, where the band [[Figrin D'an II and the New Modal Nodes]] played in a large glass aquarium in the center of the dance floor.<ref name="Travel Book" />

{{Stub}}
